title: Process 1629 (podman) crashed in runtime.raise.abi0()
body:
### Issue Description

After yesterday's update I have the following problem:

`Process 1629 (podman) crashed in runtime.raise.abi0()`

podman version 5.3.1, fedora 41, CPU AMD 2600G
yesterday's updated software packages:
```
amd-gpu-firmware 20241110-1.fc41
intel-gpu-firmware 20241110-1.fc41
dnf5-plugins 5.2.8.1-1.fc41
intel-gpu-firmware 20241110-1.fc41
linux-firmware 20241110-1.fc41
nodejs 1:22.11.0-2.fc41
nxpwireless-firmware 20241110-1.fc41
amd-ucode-firmware 20241110-1.fc41
cirrus-audio-firmware 20241110-1.fc41
gssproxy 0.9.2-4.fc41
libdnf5 5.2.8.1-1.fc41
linux-firmware-whence 20241110-1.fc41
nodejs-docs 1:22.11.0-2.fc41
nodejs-npm 1:10.9.0-1.22.11.0.2.fc41
realtek-firmware 20241110-1.fc41
atheros-firmware 20241110-1.fc41
dnf5 5.2.8.1-1.fc41
intel-audio-firmware 20241110-1.fc41
libdnf5-cli 5.2.8.1-1.fc41
mt7xxx-firmware 20241110-1.fc41
nodejs-full-i18n 1:22.11.0-2.fc41
nvidia-gpu-firmware 20241110-1.fc41
tiwilink-firmware 20241110-1.fc41
```

but.. `podman version`  give me
